vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm thay cho lời cảm ơn
vocab.example: My previous employer gave me a sleek chronograph as a token of appreciation for my five years of service.

vocab.meaning: kỷ niệm một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My parents bought me a sophisticated timepiece to commemorate the milestone of my university graduation.

vocab.meaning: món đồ sở hữu quý giá (đầy trân trọng)
vocab.example: Although it's not the most expensive item I own, that gifted watch remains a cherished possession.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch, không phô trương
vocab.example: The watch I received from my partner has an understated elegance that suits my minimalist style perfectly.
Giving someone a luxury watch is quite a generous gesture, considering the significant investment involved.
I view a watch as an everlasting memento because, unlike clothes, it doesn't wear out or go out of style quickly.

vocab.meaning: tượng trưng cho một mối liên kết/quan hệ
vocab.example: The matching watches we exchanged were meant to symbolize the strong bond of our friendship.

vocab.meaning: phần chạm khắc theo yêu cầu riêng
vocab.example: The watch was extra special because it featured a bespoke engraving of my initials on the back of the case.

vocab.meaning: gu thẩm mỹ hoàn hảo/không chê vào đâu được
vocab.example: The person who gifted me this watch clearly has impeccable taste; it’s both functional and visually stunning.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn bó về mặt cảm xúc
vocab.example: I developed a deep sentimental attachment to the watch since it was the last gift I received from my grandfather.
